name: Orb of Frost
description: Slowly growing since the universe began, it will envelop everything when it ends.

abilities.name: Frost
abilities.description: The wielder's attacks apply a movement speed slow on enemy units. Move Speed Slow: 6%. Duration: 3. Health Restore Reduction: 13%. Move Speed Slow: 13%. The frigid attacks also reduce the effectiveness of health restoration on the targets.
